zh.Marston Trussel, Northamptonshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾馬爾斯頓 特波瑟爾
zh.Billesley, Warwick, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾比勒斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Osbert de Trussell於大約1145年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾馬爾斯頓 特波瑟爾時，他的父親Mr de Trussell27歲，母親Mrs. Trussell32歲。他於大約1162年與Mrs Trussell在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾比勒斯利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1200年在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.Marston Trussel, Northamptonshire, Engla: 英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾馬爾斯頓 特波瑟爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Osbert de Trussell于大约1145年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾馬爾斯頓 特波瑟爾时，他的父亲Mr de Trussell27岁，母亲Mrs. Trussell32岁。他于大约1162年与Mrs Trussell在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾比勒斯利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1200年在他的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trussell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English trus(s)el(le) ‘bundle, parcel’ (Old French troussel), perhaps for a porter (see Truss ), or from the same word in the sense ‘stamp, mould (for stamping coins)’, for someone who minted coins.
variant of Thrussell, a nickname from Middle English thros(t)el, thrus(t)el ‘song thrush’ (Old English thros(t)le). Compare Thrush .

variants.name: Truss
meanings: English (mainly Essex and Middlesex): metonymic occupational name from Middle English trusse ‘bundle, package’ (Old French trousse), perhaps for a porter. See also Trussell .
Americanized form of Ukrainian Trus: nickname from trus ‘rabbit’, typically applied to someone thought to be a coward.

nameMeanings.name: Osbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ōs ‘god’ + beorht ‘bright, famous’. It is not now common, but in the earlier 20th century it enjoyed a modest vogue in Britain, being borne for example by the cartoonist Osbert Lancaster ( 1908–86 ) and the writer Osbert Sitwell ( 1892–1969 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Osbert de Trussell was born about 1145, in Marston Trussel, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Mr de Trussell, was 27 and his mother, Mrs. Trussell, was 32. He married Mrs Trussell about 1162, in Billesley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1200, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Osbert de Trussell est né environ 1145, à Marston Trussel, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Mr de Trussell, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Trussell, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Trussell environ 1162, à Billesley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1200, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

Er hat um 1162 in Billesley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs Trussell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1200 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Osbert de Trussellが約1145年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアマーストン トルセルで生まれた時，父Mr de Trussellは27歳，母Mrs. Trussellは32歳であった。約1162年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビレスリーでMrs Trussellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1200年に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Osbert de Trussell(이)가 대략 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 마스턴 트루셀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mr de Trussell(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Trussell(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1162년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 빌레슬리에서 Mrs Trussell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1200년 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Osbert de Trussell родился около 1145 г. в местности марстон трассел, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Mr de Trussell было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Trussell, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Trussell около 1162 г. в местности биллесли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1200 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.
